code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn get_int(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn find_idx(_ input: String, _ starts: List<Int>, _ lens: List<Int>, _ ts: Int, _ tl: Int) -> Int
  let n = starts.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let l = get_int(lens, i)
    if l == tl
      let s = get_int(starts, i)
      let a = string.substring(input, s, s + l)
      let b = string.substring(input, ts, ts + tl)
      if a == b
        return i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  -1
end

fn increment_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = get_int(xs, i)
    if i == idx
      result = list.push(result, v + 1)
    else
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut starts: List<Int> = []
  mut lens: List<Int> = []
  mut counts: List<Int> = []
  mut tok_start = -1
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut boundary = false
    if i == n
      boundary = true
    else
      if is_ws(byte_at(input, i))
        boundary = true
      end
    end
    if boundary
      if tok_start >= 0
        let tl = i - tok_start
        let idx = find_idx(input, starts, lens, tok_start, tl)
        if idx < 0
          starts = list.push(starts, tok_start)
          lens = list.push(lens, tl)
          counts = list.push(counts, 1)
        else
          counts = increment_at(counts, idx)
        end
        tok_start = -1
      end
    else
      if tok_start < 0
        tok_start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let total = counts.len()
  if total == 0
    println("top==0")
  else
    mut max_idx = 0
    mut max_count = get_int(counts, 0)
    mut j = 1
    while j < total
      let v = get_int(counts, j)
      if v > max_count
        max_count = v
        max_idx = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    let s = get_int(starts, max_idx)
    let l = get_int(lens, max_idx)
    let token = string.substring(input, s, s + l)
    println("top=#{token}=#{max_count}")
  end
end
